blockers.description: Runtime bug: campaigns list screen shows 'Couldn't load your campaigns' error on launch
blockers.workaround: Check Electron main process log at %AppData%\SoloCampaign\logs\main.log for the actual error. Most likely cause: characters.ts statically imports pdfService.ts which chains to @react-pdf/renderer (ESM-only v4) — if the bundle can't resolve it at load time, the entire tRPC router fails, making campaigns.list throw. Alternative: migration issue or module initialization error in campaignsRouter.

blockers.description: 08-07 code committed in worktree (not yet merged to master)

human_actions_pending.action: Diagnose and fix the campaigns list runtime error before continuing
human_actions_pending.context: The app crashes with 'Couldn't load your campaigns' when opened. The exact error is in %AppData%\SoloCampaign\logs\main.log. Fix must land on master before merging the 08-07 worktree.

human_actions_pending.action: Complete the accessibility verification (Task 3 of 08-07) after bug is fixed
human_actions_pending.context: Launch the fixed app, test keyboard nav + screen reader + icon labels per checkpoint instructions in the conversation. Reply 'approved' or describe issues.

decisions.decision: Two electron-store instances for 'appPrefs' (main/index.ts + tRPC router)
decisions.rationale: Plan 08-01 design: main/index.ts needs it before app.whenReady for IPC bridge; tRPC router uses it for mutation procedures. electron-store is file-based and supports multiple readers.

decisions.decision: alert.tsx add/add conflict resolved by keeping 08-04 version (trailing comma style)
decisions.rationale: Both agents scaffolded identical component. 08-04 style chosen arbitrarily — content is functionally identical.
Pre-existing tRPC/react-query peer dep conflict requires --legacy-peer-deps for any new package installs.
